title: Large Brownfield Migration Request
prompt: We need to move our legacy permissions model to a new access-review system over several quarters.

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Produces an explicit intake artifact or equivalent routing summary rather than a migration plan

assertions.name: routes-to-brownfield-discovery
assertions.description: Recognizes this as a brownfield discovery-level effort and chooses a multi-phase path instead of immediate execution

assertions.name: preserves-uncertainty
assertions.description: Keeps major migration unknowns or risks explicit instead of inventing a concrete rollout plan

assertions.name: names-downstream-handoff
assertions.description: Names the next skill or handoff destination explicitly and explains why it is next

assertions.name: stays-out-of-cutover-design
assertions.description: Does not primarily turn into architecture, cutover sequencing, or implementation detail
